- I am thrilled to announce that I will be joining UCLA as a Computer Science PhD student in the Software Engineering Analysis Lab (SEAL) starting Fall 2026! I'm incredibly excited to work with Professor Miryung Kim. A huge thank you to my family, friends, and mentors who supported me through this journey!

- Our paper, [Toward Reproducible and Standardized Computer Architecture Simulation with gem5](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13479), was accepted to appear in the IEEE International Symposium on Performance Analysis of Systems and Software (ISPASS) 2026. A huge thank you to my collaborators!
